purpose: Prevent duplicate research, duplicate code changes, and duplicate knowledge distillation across sessions. Every new session MUST read this file before starting work.

absorbed_references.description: External resources already studied and integrated. Do NOT re-research these.

papers.title: Floyd-Steinberg Dithering in perceptual color space
Multi-layer compositing for pixel art (Photoshop-style layer separation)
VFX-specific evaluation criteria (motion, energy, variance over fill/outline)
SDF curvature estimation via Laplacian for adaptive outline width
Procedural Creature Generation and Animation for Games

research_session_018.findings: Verlet particles, Fourier descriptors, cage deformation
Hidden layers with sin/gaussian/sawtooth produce richer textures
JSON metadata with rect/duration/loop for Unity/Godot
Bezier curves, spring physics, critically damped oscillators

research_session_025.findings: Semantic mutation should expand toward archetypes, anatomy templates, clothing layers, accessory slots, grammar-guided topology, and structured part compatibility rather than only local numeric perturbation.
Benchmark assets should include structured metadata, acceptance thresholds, and automated validators for characters, tilesets, and VFX rather than relying only on internal evaluator scores.
WFC should be elevated into AssetPipeline with connectivity/playability constraints, metadata manifests, and multi-pass assembly instead of staying as a disconnected module.
Shader artifacts should support baked-texture plus runtime-parameter metadata export so generated assets become more engine-ready and reusable downstream.

research_session_025.topic: Per-frame SDF animation, secondary motion, and organic textures
research_session_025.findings: Keyframed SDF parameter tracks, spring-based overlap, and reaction-diffusion masks are the clearest next upgrades for motion liveliness and material richness.

research_session_026.topic: Precision parallel research protocol for project upgrades
research_session_026.findings: External research should trigger only when it unlocks a concrete implementation or evaluation decision. Query lattices, source ranking, stop conditions, and write-back notes reduce duplicate searching and improve implementation relevance.
Keeping both a repo-local protocol file and a validated reusable skill gives future sessions a stable default search workflow inside and outside the repository.

completed_changes.description: Code changes already made. Do NOT redo these.

SESSION-018.change: Pipeline fix: reference/palette now passed to evaluator
CPPN: 70% enriched initial population in MAP-Elites

SESSION-019.change: CRITICAL BUG FIX: All SDF primitive calls converted to keyword arguments
Palette-constrained rendering: Floyd-Steinberg dither in OKLAB space
BUG FIX: result.overall → result.overall_score in produce_vfx()
Palette-constrained kwargs passed from produce_sprite to _build_generator

SESSION-020.change: Multi-layer render compositing: render_sdf_layered() + LayeredRenderResult + composite_layers()
Updated sdf/__init__.py exports: render_sdf_layered, composite_layers, LayeredRenderResult
VFX evaluator: evaluate_vfx() with rebalanced weights (_VFX_WEIGHTS, _VFX_THRESHOLDS)
VFX evaluator: evaluate_multi_frame_vfx() for multi-frame peak scoring
Large-scale evolution validation script (4 shapes, 120 iters)

SESSION-021.change: Adaptive outline width: _compute_adaptive_outline_width() using SDF Laplacian curvature
adaptive_outline parameter added to render_sdf() and render_sdf_layered()
produce_layered_sprite() now routes textured styles through render_textured_sdf_layered()
Shape-complexity-aware evolution params in produce_sprite(): adaptive patience/population/min_delta
Full project audit: 14-module functional testing + commercial gap analysis

SESSION-022.change: Character asset pack pipeline integration: CharacterSpec + produce_character_pack()
Character renderer no longer hard-requires SciPy for outline dilation
Evaluator no-palette metric now skips neutrally instead of silently penalizing
Package version aligned to pyproject metadata

SESSION-025.change: Dedup-first parallel gap research synthesized into a reusable note file
Handoff priorities refreshed to point future sessions at semantic mutation space, benchmark suites, and pipeline closure
Dedup registry updated with newly absorbed non-duplicate reference directions

SESSION-026.change: Repository-level precision parallel research protocol added
Future-session handoff and machine state updated to reference the new protocol by default
Dedup registry updated so protocol design work is not rediscovered in later sessions

known_stagnation_patterns.description: Patterns that caused wasted effort in past sessions. Avoid repeating.

patterns.pattern: generator_invariant — parameter changes don't affect visual output
patterns.root_cause: SDF shape parameters have narrow effective ranges; most of parameter space maps to same visual
patterns.fix: Widen parameter ranges in ParameterSpace, ensure radius >= 0.25

patterns.pattern: evaluator_too_lenient — all images get high scores
patterns.root_cause: Only 5 metrics, no palette/reference passed, skip-to-1.0 for missing data
patterns.fix: 12 metrics, default penalty for missing palette/reference, stricter thresholds
create_enriched() with 2-4 hidden nodes and diverse activations

patterns.pattern: Knowledge base empty — rules and models not registered
patterns.root_cause: No one populated knowledge/rules.json and math_models.json

patterns.pattern: Repeated research on same topics across sessions
patterns.root_cause: No dedup registry, no record of absorbed references

patterns.pattern: SDF shapes invisible — star/gem/shield render as empty images
patterns.root_cause: Positional argument mismatch: star(n, r1, r2) maps to cx=n (off-screen). All primitives use (cx, cy, ...) signature but callers assumed (param1, param2, ...)
patterns.fix: All 42 call sites converted to keyword arguments. RULE: Never use positional args for SDF primitives.

patterns.root_cause: produce_vfx() used result.overall but EvaluationResult has result.overall_score

patterns.pattern: Repeated broad audits and duplicate research in new conversations
patterns.root_cause: Cross-session intent was not fingerprinted, so similar requests could trigger the same audit/research loop again
patterns.fix: Added SessionGuard fingerprinting, duplicate-work warnings, and stricter handoff instructions

patterns.pattern: Character system existed but remained a disconnected demo path
patterns.root_cause: character_renderer.py was not wired into AssetPipeline or batch production
patterns.fix: Added produce_character_pack() and integrated character packs into produce_asset_pack()

session_efficiency_rules.description: Rules for future sessions to avoid wasted effort.
rules: RULE-1: Read DEDUP_REGISTRY.json BEFORE starting any research
RULE-2: Read SESSION_HANDOFF.md for current state and priorities
RULE-3: Check STAGNATION_LOG.md for known failure patterns
RULE-4: Do NOT re-research any topic listed in absorbed_references
RULE-5: Do NOT re-implement any change listed in completed_changes
RULE-6: When adding new research, append to absorbed_references
RULE-7: When making code changes, append to completed_changes
RULE-8: Run test_evolution_validation.py to verify changes work (expect 19/19 pass)
RULE-9: If evolution stagnates, check known_stagnation_patterns first
RULE-10: Always update SESSION_HANDOFF.md and PROJECT_BRAIN.json before ending
RULE-11: NEVER use positional arguments for SDF primitives (circle, box, star, ring, triangle)
RULE-12: EvaluationResult uses .overall_score not .overall
RULE-13: Use evaluate_vfx() or evaluate_multi_frame_vfx() for VFX assets, NOT evaluate()
RULE-14: Run test_session020_validation.py to verify changes work (expect 24/24 pass)
RULE-15: Run test_session021_validation.py to verify changes work (expect 20/20 pass)
RULE-16: Correct class names: ShaderCodeGenerator (not ShaderGenerator), LSystem (not LSystemGenerator), AssetExporter (not ExportBridge)
RULE-17: PaletteGenerator.generate() uses harmony= parameter (not scheme=)
RULE-18: Before another general audit, check whether the target subsystem changed materially; otherwise continue the current bottleneck instead of repeating the audit
RULE-19: Use SessionGuard fingerprints before broad research or restart work on a previously discussed goal
RULE-20: Character rendering is now in the pipeline; the next character milestone is evolution/search, not re-adding basic character export
